mapper.select: SELECT file_id , board_id , original_name , save_name , size , delete_yn , created_date , deleted_date FROM archive_file_info WHERE delete_yn = 0 AND board_id = #{value} ORDER BY file_id
mapper.update:
UPDATE archive_file_info SET delete_yn = 1 , deleted_date = NOW() WHERE file_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT file_id , board_id , original_name , save_name , size , delete_yn , created_date , deleted_date FROM archive_file_info WHERE delete_yn = 0 AND file_id = #{value}
